title: IdeaCampaign v1
description: SSOT artifact: campaign-level snapshot for idea search (charter + status/budget/island observability + key artifact refs).
$comment: Stub schema (v0.2): intentionally denormalized (does not embed CampaignStatus envelope) to avoid redundant nested campaign_id fields.

early_stop_reason.description: Optional machine-readable reason when status=early_stopped (policy halt rather than budget exhaustion).

distributor_policy_config_ref.description: Artifact reference (URI) to distributor_policy_config_v1.json for this campaign (if enabled).

seed_pack_ref.description: Artifact reference (URI) to the campaign-scoped seed pack used to initialize exploration.
